updates.title: Instrumentation validated; clean baseline ladder next
updates.summary: A dirty-tree diagnostic tiny run measured 0.33 ms mean CPU frame time (~3,014 potential FPS), ~60 displayed FPS in headless Chromium, and HUD agreement within 1.34%. These are validation numbers only, not the committed M1 baseline.

updates.title: PR #308 synced and baseline tests passed
updates.summary: The isolated worktree is synced to PR head. Extension and benchmark typechecks and unit-test baselines were green before M1 changes.
